title: diandrochloa japonica
intro: Diandrochloa japonica, also known as Japanese angelica or tama hage, is a type of plant that belongs to the Apiaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, relieving menstrual cramps, and alleviating respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tonics, and is also used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine.
